title: Inference Living Doc Skill Static Overview Run
subtitle: Governed run for refreshing the static overview of the inference-living-doc-run-codex skill.
sourceCoverage: The skill source at .agents/skills/inference-living-doc-run-codex/SKILL.md, the static overview artifact, and local HTML/browser verification.
objective: Refresh the static HTML overview for the inference-living-doc-run-codex skill so it is clearer, more polished, and accurately reflects the current full-harness workflow.
successCondition: docs/inference-living-doc-run-codex-skill.html is updated as a standalone static overview of the skill, grounded in the current SKILL.md, with local verification and committed source state.

callouts.title: Run boundary
items: The durable deliverable is the standalone static overview HTML.
The run doc is audit and governance state for this refresh.
The skill source remains canonical; the overview summarizes it without replacing it.

callout.title: Current run state
items: The static overview HTML has been updated and locally checked.
Coverage has no uncovered facets or invalid edges.

data.name: One full-harness mode
notes: The overview now reflects that the skill always runs the full harness for an invoked complex objective.
The previous overview language implying continuation or lighter commit modes was removed.

data.name: Document readiness is not objective readiness
notes: The refreshed page foregrounds documentReady and objectiveReady as separate proof obligations.
The overview states that source-system and verification evidence decide objective readiness.

data.name: Standalone HTML overview
notes: Replaced the older overview with a new standalone page organized around Contract, Run Loop, Workflow, Gates, Delivery, Readiness, and Traps.
The page avoids external assets or runtime dependencies.
The content is grounded in the current skill source.

data.name: Canonical skill source
data.what_it_does: Defines the full-harness behavior, readiness split, workflow, delivery gates, trap handling, and final response format.
why_it_matters: The overview must summarize this source rather than inventing a different operating model.

data.name: Static overview artifact
data.what_it_does: Provides a standalone HTML explanation of the skill for human readers.
why_it_matters: This is the durable artifact requested by the user.

data.name: Static source token check
automationPaths: node -e source check for title, nav anchors, and section IDs
data.currentCoverage: Confirmed the file contains the expected title and the Contract, Run Loop, Workflow, Delivery, and Readiness sections.
data.nextStep: Keep this check as a quick guard for accidental truncation.

data.name: Chromium layout smoke check
automationPaths: node --input-type=module Playwright Chromium check at 1440x1000 and 390x844
data.currentCoverage: Confirmed title, section count, navigation count, H1, and no document-level horizontal overflow at desktop and mobile widths.
data.nextStep: No further browser debugging needed for this static refresh unless visual QA is requested.

objectiveFacets.name: Frame objective
objectiveFacets.description: The objective and success condition are explicit enough to guide work.

objectiveFacets.name: Hydrate sources
objectiveFacets.description: The current skill source and existing overview are inspected before rewriting the artifact.

objectiveFacets.name: Implement or resolve
objectiveFacets.description: The static HTML overview is refreshed as the durable artifact.

objectiveFacets.name: Verify outcome
objectiveFacets.description: Local checks support the final status of the overview artifact.

objectiveFacets.name: Finalize handoff
objectiveFacets.description: The run document records source links, residual risks, completion state, and committed source state.

coverage.rationale: The status snapshot records the objective boundary and remaining finalization work.
The main source decision is carried from the current skill source into the overview.
The canonical skill source is explicitly linked.
The refreshed HTML page is the durable artifact for the user request.
The token check guards basic HTML completeness and expected sections.
The browser smoke check guards desktop and mobile layout overflow.
The durable overview artifact is linked for handoff.

invariants.name: Status needs evidence
invariants.statement: Do not mark the objective complete unless verification evidence is linked to the relevant section or card.

invariants.name: Skill source remains canonical
invariants.statement: The static overview must summarize the current SKILL.md behavior and must not introduce a weaker operating mode.

invariants.name: Durable artifact owned by HTML
invariants.statement: The run doc tracks governance and evidence, but the user-facing deliverable is docs/inference-living-doc-run-codex-skill.html.

invariants.name: Source detail owned by source
invariants.statement: Large, operational, canonical, or executable detail should live in a source artifact and be linked from the doc.
